items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 11 studies (5 RCTs, 6 comparative cohorts, N=1089) found no significant difference in ROM or complication rates between early (≤14 days) and conventional (≥28 days) rehabilitation after rTSA, but noted small improvements in functional outcomes and pain for early rehab.
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复，这篇系统综述支持早期康复。尽管运动范围（ROM）和并发症风险无显著差异，但早期康复在功能和疼痛上显示出小幅优势。你可以据此在术后早期（≤14天）启动康复，以改善患者体验。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与常规康复的功能结局和并发症：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项包含11项研究（5项RCT，6项比较队列研究，N=1089）的系统综述发现，rTSA术后早期（≤14天）与常规（≥28天）康复在ROM或并发症发生率上无显著差异，但在功能结局和疼痛方面，早期康复有小幅改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: For reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) post-op rehab, this systematic review supports early mobilization. While ROM and complication risks showed no significant difference, early rehab demonstrated small benefits in function and pain. You can use this to initiate rehab early (≤14 days post-op) to improve patient experience.
items.limitation: 纳入研究类型除了RCTs，也包含比较性队列研究，可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The review included comparative cohort studies in addition to RCTs, which may introduce bias.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 23 RCTs (N=1364) found that exercise interventions significantly reduced pain (SMD = -0.63, 95% CI -0.84 to -0.42) and improved function (SMD = -0.58, 95% CI -0.76 to -0.39) in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 运动干预在治疗中老年肩袖相关肩痛方面是有效的，能显著改善疼痛和功能。这坐实了运动疗法作为一线干预的地位，你应继续将其作为中老年肩痛患者的核心治疗手段。
items.titleZh: 运动干预治疗中老年肩袖相关肩痛：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含23项RCT（N=1364）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，运动干预能显著减轻中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛（SMD = -0.63）并改善功能（SMD = -0.58）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise interventions are effective in treating rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults, significantly improving pain and function. This solidifies the role of exercise therapy as a first-line intervention; you should continue to prioritize it as a core treatment for this patient population.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响了结果的精确性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies might affect the precision of the results.

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 23 studies (N=2389) found good diagnostic and prognostic accuracy for both Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-BESTest in stroke individuals, but noted variability in optimal cutoff values based on the reference standard.
items.curatedReason: 在卒中患者的诊断和预后评估中，Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest在诊断和预测准确性上表现良好，但具体的截断值因参考标准而异。根据患者需求和目标，选择合适的工具和截断值，以提高评估的精确性。
items.titleZh: Berg平衡量表和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含23项研究（N=2389）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，Berg平衡量表（BBS）和Mini-BESTest在卒中患者中均具有良好的诊断和预后准确性，但最佳截断值因参考标准而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For diagnostic and prognostic assessment in stroke patients, both the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-BESTest perform well in terms of accuracy, though specific cutoff values vary by reference standard. Choose the appropriate tool and cutoff based on patient needs and goals to enhance assessment precision.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的参考标准和截断值存在异质性，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in reference standards and cutoff values among included studies may affect the generalizability of results.

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 11 RCTs (N=515) found that dry needling significantly improved mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points, specifically reducing muscle stiffness, compared to sham or non-invasive treatments.
items.curatedReason: 干针疗法能有效改善肌筋膜触发点（MTrPs）的机械特性，特别是降低肌肉僵硬。如果你正在使用干针疗法，这个发现肯定了其对MTrPs生理效应的直接影响，值得在临床实践中考虑。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点肌肉机械特性：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含11项RCT（N=515）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与假干预或非侵入性治疗相比，干针疗法能显著改善肌筋膜触发点的机械特性，特别是降低肌肉僵硬。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dry needling effectively improves the mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points (MTrPs), particularly reducing muscle stiffness. If you are using dry needling, this finding confirms its direct physiological effect on MTrPs, which is worth considering in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 一些研究可能存在偏倚风险，且机械特性评估方法存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: Some studies might have a risk of bias, and there was heterogeneity in mechanical property assessment methods.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey (N=75 physiotherapists) found that a brief online education program significantly improved physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding the biopsychosocial approach to chronic low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预能有效提升物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的生物心理社会模型的理解和态度，即使是简短的干预也有帮助。这是一个成本效益高的继续教育方向，有助于改善临床思维。
items.titleZh: 简短在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念的影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对75名物理治疗师的干预前后调查显示，简短的在线教育项目显著改善了他们对慢性腰痛生物心理社会方法的知识、态度和信念。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online educational interventions can effectively improve physiotherapists' knowledge and attitudes towards the biopsychosocial model for chronic low back pain, even with brief interventions. This represents a cost-effective direction for continuing education that helps refine clinical reasoning.
items.limitation: 这是一项前瞻性非随机研究，干预前后对比缺乏对照组，可能存在混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This was a prospective, non-randomized study lacking a control group for pre-post intervention comparison, which may introduce confounding factors.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review of 11 studies (N=1055) found insufficient evidence to determine an optimal duration of supervised rehabilitation after ACL reconstruction, citing methodological quality issues and varied outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 目前关于前交叉韧带重建术后康复持续时间的证据尚不明确。在你制定康复计划时，应根据患者个体情况和功能进展来决定，而非僵硬地遵循特定时长。
items.titleZh: 监督康复持续时间对前交叉韧带重建术后结局的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对11项研究（N=1055）的系统综述发现，目前没有充足证据确定ACL重建术后监督康复的最佳持续时间，原因在于方法学质量问题和结局指标多样。
items.curatedReasonEn: Evidence regarding the optimal duration of supervised rehabilitation following ACL reconstruction remains inconclusive. When developing rehabilitation plans, base your decisions on individual patient progress and functional milestones, rather than rigid adherence to specific timeframes.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量较低，且结局指标多样，导致无法进行荟萃分析。
items.limitationEn: The methodological quality of included studies was low, and diverse outcome measures prevented meta-analysis.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=60, aged 6-12) found that the Lung Boost Trainer significantly improved pulmonary function (FEV1, FVC, PEF) in COVID-hemiplegic cerebral palsy children compared to an incentive spirometer (p<0.05).
items.curatedReason: 对于患有偏瘫型脑瘫且曾感染COVID-19的儿童，Lung Boost Trainer在改善肺功能方面优于激励性肺活量计。在呼吸康复时，考虑使用Lung Boost Trainer来优化这些儿童的肺部结局。
items.titleZh: Lung Boost Trainer与激励性肺活量计对新冠后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60，6-12岁）发现，在新冠后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童中，Lung Boost Trainer在改善肺功能（FEV1, FVC, PEF）方面显著优于激励性肺活量计（p<0.05）。
items.curatedReasonEn: For children with hemiplegic cerebral palsy who have had COVID-19, the Lung Boost Trainer is superior to an incentive spirometer in improving pulmonary function. Consider using the Lung Boost Trainer in respiratory rehabilitation to optimize pulmonary outcomes for these children.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且仅针对特定人群，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size and targeted a specific population, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study (N=1626) in primary care found that individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches showed comparable improvements in pain and function for patients with chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性疼痛管理中，小组和混合物理治疗与个体治疗在疼痛和功能改善上效果相当。这意味着在资源有限或需要规模化服务时，可以考虑小组或混合模式，同时不牺牲患者体验。
items.titleZh: 个体、小组和混合物理治疗对初级保健慢性疼痛患者疼痛和功能的比较效果：回顾性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对初级保健中1626名慢性疼痛患者的回顾性观察研究发现，个体、小组和混合物理治疗方法在改善疼痛和功能方面显示出相似的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: In chronic pain management, group-based and mixed physiotherapy approaches are comparable to individual sessions in improving pain and function. This suggests that in resource-constrained settings or when scaling services, group or mixed models can be considered without sacrificing patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性观察研究，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素的风险。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective observational study, carrying risks of selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain, categorizing them across 14 theoretical domains.
items.curatedReason: 物理治疗师在慢性疼痛管理中实施高价值物理治疗时面临多重障碍，包括知识、技能和信念等。了解这些障碍能帮助你制定更有效的策略，促进循证实践。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在实施慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗中的障碍和促成因素：一项范围综述和叙述性综合分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对37项研究的范围综述和叙述性综合分析识别了物理治疗师在实施慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗中的障碍和促成因素，将其分为14个理论领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapists encounter multiple barriers, including knowledge, skills, and beliefs, when implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain. Understanding these barriers helps you develop more effective strategies to promote evidence-based practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项范围综述，侧重于映射文献而非评估干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focused on mapping literature rather than evaluating intervention efficacy.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (N=42) using accelerometry found that individuals with Achilles tendon rupture had lower physical activity levels than healthy controls at 2, 6, and 12 months post-rupture, with limited association between activity and patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 跟腱断裂患者在术后一年内的身体活动水平普遍低于健康同龄人。你需要有意识地在康复计划中加入更多提升活动量和功能表现的干预措施，以弥补这一差距。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后通过加速度计评估的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项使用加速度计的前瞻性队列研究（N=42）发现，跟腱断裂个体在术后2、6和12个月的身体活动水平低于健康对照组，且活动水平与患者报告结局之间的关联有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with Achilles tendon rupture generally exhibit lower physical activity levels than healthy peers up to one year post-surgery. You need to intentionally incorporate interventions that increase activity volume and functional performance into rehab plans to bridge this gap.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心前瞻性队列研究，结果可能不完全适用于其他人群和治疗环境。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center prospective cohort study, and its findings might not be fully generalizable to other populations and treatment settings.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study (N=10 youth with CP) showed a 12-week community-based RIPT program improved goal performance (GAS scores increased by 2.6-3.7 points), satisfaction, gait speed, walking capacity, and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 一项社区基础的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）试点项目显示，对脑瘫青少年能有效改善其目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力。你可以考虑将此类项目纳入对脑瘫青少年的康复方案中。
items.titleZh: 社区基础的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究（N=10名脑瘫青少年）显示，为期12周的社区基础RIPT项目改善了目标表现（GAS评分增加2.6-3.7分）、满意度、步速、步行能力和无氧能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: A community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) pilot program effectively improved goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy. You may consider incorporating such programs into rehabilitation plans for this population.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的预设前后对比的试点研究，缺乏对照组，可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a small-sample pre-post pilot study lacking a control group, which may introduce bias.

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: A non-randomized study (N=30 older adults with knee OA) found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics, specifically increasing hip adduction moment and knee flexion moment during walking.
items.curatedReason: 局部缺血预处理（IPC）可能通过改变步态力学来影响膝骨关节炎老年患者。虽然这仅仅是一项单次干预的小样本研究，但它提示了非运动疗法在步态调节上的潜力，值得你持续关注后续研究。
items.titleZh: 局部缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 一项非随机研究（N=30名膝骨关节炎老年患者）发现，单次局部缺血预处理干预改变了步态力学，特别是增加了行走时的髋关节内收力矩和膝关节屈曲力矩。
items.curatedReasonEn: Ischemic preconditioning (IPC) might affect older adults with knee osteoarthritis by altering gait mechanics. While this is a small, single-session intervention study, it suggests the potential of non-exercise therapies in gait modulation, warranting your continued attention to future research.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的非对照研究，且仅观察单次干预后的短期效应，结果的临床意义有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a small-sample, non-controlled study observing only short-term effects after a single intervention, limiting clinical significance.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified various preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players, categorized into strength, balance, plyometrics, agility, and neuromuscular training programs.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述总结了男性足球运动员预防非接触性下肢损伤的各种策略。它可以帮你全面了解目前预防策略的广度和类型，但具体实施仍需结合循证实践和个体化评估。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的各种预防策略，主要分为力量、平衡、增强式、敏捷性和神经肌肉训练方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes various strategies for preventing non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. It can help you gain a comprehensive overview of current preventive approaches, but specific implementation still requires evidence-based practice and individualized assessment.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，其目的在于映射文献，而非评估证据质量或进行效果比较。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its purpose is to map literature, not to assess evidence quality or compare efficacy.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different physical therapy methods and techniques in improving symptoms triggered by endometriosis.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了物理治疗技术在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性。在临床实践中，你可以依据这些证据，考虑将特定的物理治疗干预整合到子宫内膜异位症患者的综合治疗方案中。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析评估了不同物理治疗方法和技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in managing endometriosis symptoms. In clinical practice, you can consider integrating specific physical therapy interventions into comprehensive treatment plans for endometriosis patients based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量存在差异，且许多研究样本量较小，可能影响结果的综合强度。
items.limitationEn: Variations in methodological quality and small sample sizes in many included studies may affect the overall strength of the results.

items.title: From rehabilitation to performance: reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimise sports performance.
items.summary: This article discusses reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimize sports performance, moving beyond traditional rehabilitation contexts.
items.curatedReason: 将前庭-眼动干预从传统康复范畴扩展至运动表现优化，提供了新的视角。这提示你，在评估和训练运动员时，可以考虑整合这些技术以提升运动表现和减少伤害风险。
items.titleZh: 从康复到表现：重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现，超越了传统的康复语境。
items.curatedReasonEn: Reframing vestibular-ocular interventions from traditional rehabilitation to sports performance optimization offers a new perspective. This suggests that when assessing and training athletes, you can consider integrating these techniques to enhance athletic performance and reduce injury risk.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (N=54 analyzed) found 12 sessions of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (Numeric Rating Scale: -6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001) and function (MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001) compared to sham in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP) patients at 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 高强度激光治疗（HILT）在股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）疼痛和功能改善上显著优于假治疗，并可能改善神经传导。可以将其作为一种有效的非侵入性治疗手段纳入你的方案。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压综合征的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（N=54分析）发现，对于股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）患者，12周内12次高强度激光治疗（HILT）在改善疼痛（数字评定量表：-6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001）和功能（MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001）方面显著优于假治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly outperforms sham treatment for pain and functional improvement in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP), and may also improve nerve conduction. You can incorporate it as an effective non-invasive treatment option into your protocols.
items.limitation: 随访期相对较短（12周），长期疗效仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period was relatively short (12 weeks), and long-term efficacy requires further investigation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: "Comparison Between Robotic and Conventional Walking Recovery Training Methods in People With Spinal Cord Injury": Systematic Review with Pairwise and Network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of 16 studies compared Robotic Body Weight Supported Treadmill Training (RBWSTT), Overground Robotic Exoskeleton Training (ORET), and Conventional Physiotherapy (CP) on gait and cardiovascular outcomes in individuals with Spinal Cord Injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓损伤患者的步行恢复训练，机器人辅助训练（RBWSTT, ORET）与传统物理治疗的疗效对比仍存在争议。在具体患者选择时，结合伤情、资源和个体反应，可以考虑作为传统治疗的辅助或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机器人与传统步行恢复训练方法在脊髓损伤患者中的比较：系统综述与配对及网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含16项研究的系统综述和网络荟萃分析比较了机器人体重支持跑步机训练（RBWSTT）、地面机器人外骨骼训练（ORET）和传统物理治疗（CP）对脊髓损伤患者步态和心血管结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparison between robotic-assisted training (RBWSTT, ORET) and conventional physiotherapy for walking recovery in SCI patients remains controversial. When selecting for specific patients, consider robotic options as adjuncts or alternatives to conventional therapy, based on injury characteristics, resources, and individual response.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=16）数量较少，不同干预类型和患者亚组间的比较数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=16) was small, and comparative data between different intervention types and patient subgroups were limited.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Community-Based Exercise for Chronic Pain in People with Spinal Cord Injury: A Pragmatic Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial tested the hypothesis that home/community-based exercise, prescribed according to the Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) Exercise Guidelines, reduces chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 按照脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的社区居家运动方案，有望有效减轻慢性疼痛。这坐实了指南的重要性，并支持你推广此类社区康复模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤者慢性疼痛的社区运动：一项实用随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项实用随机对照试验旨在验证根据脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的居家/社区运动方案是否能减轻慢性疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community- and home-based exercise programs, prescribed according to SCI Exercise Guidelines, are likely effective in reducing chronic pain. This affirms the importance of these guidelines and supports your promotion of such community rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 未提供具体研究方法和结果数据，无法评估具体效应量和局限性。
items.limitationEn: Specific research methods and outcome data were not provided, making it impossible to assess specific effect sizes and limitations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine studies (N=490) found that exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation was effective in improving aerobic capacity for people with stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者，基于运动的心脏康复似乎能有效改善有氧能力。考虑将心脏康复元素整合到神经康复方案中，尤其对于有氧能力受损的患者。
items.titleZh: 心脏康复计划在改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者有氧能力方面的有效性：快速综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含9项研究（N=490）的快速综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的心脏康复在改善卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者的有氧能力方面是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with stroke or TIA, exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation appears effective in improving aerobic capacity. Consider integrating cardiac rehabilitation elements into your neurorehabilitation programs, especially for those with impaired aerobic capacity.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=490）数量较少，且质量多为低至中等。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=490) was small, and their quality was mostly low to moderate.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than cracking sound: a randomized controlled EEG study
items.summary: A randomized controlled EEG study found that short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than the cracking sound.
items.curatedReason: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松感，似乎与体感输入而非“咔哒声”更相关。这提示你应更关注手法对神经生理的影响，而不是仅以关节弹响作为疗效指标。
items.titleZh: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关：一项随机对照脑电图研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照脑电图研究发现，颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation appears more associated with somatosensory input than the "cracking sound." This suggests you should focus more on the neurophysiological effects of manual therapy rather than solely using joint cavitation as an indicator of efficacy.
items.limitation: 该研究为随机对照脑电图研究，但可能存在样本量和结局指标的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled EEG study, but may have limitations in sample size and outcome measures.

items.title: Using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible after stroke
items.summary: A study on medRxiv suggests that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible for individuals after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的。这为卒中后步态训练提供了新的、有潜力的技术方向，值得临床医生关注。
items.titleZh: 使用视觉生物反馈减少快走速度下的步长误差在卒中后患者中是可行的
items.summaryZh: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈技术来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的，为卒中后步态训练提供了新的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preprint study indicates that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible in post-stroke patients. This offers a novel and potentially valuable technical approach for gait training after stroke, worthy of clinician attention.
items.limitation: 预印本研究，尚未经过同行评审；样本量较小（n=23）。
items.limitationEn: Preprint study, not yet peer-reviewed; relatively small sample size (n=23).

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: A review highlights the need for translational designs to establish causal mechanisms in force-based manual therapy, identifying current study limitations in demonstrating 'why' and 'how' treatments work.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了手法治疗机制研究设计的局限性，强调需要更具因果推断能力的设计。它为该领域的研究者提供了重要的思考方向，但尚未直接改变临床实践。
items.titleZh: 确定手法治疗机制的恰当转化研究设计：基于力的治疗。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述强调了在手法治疗中，研究设计需要能够阐明治疗机制的因果关系，指出当前研究在解释治疗“为何”和“如何”起效方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores limitations in translational study designs for manual therapy mechanisms, emphasizing the need for more causally inferential designs. It provides important considerations for researchers in the field but does not directly alter clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究设计方法论的探讨，结论不直接涉及具体临床应用。
items.limitationEn: Discussion of research design methodology, with conclusions not directly related to specific clinical applications.

items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章作者分享了身处战争阴影下，在个人经历与临床实践之间进行思考的体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: Perspective piece where the author shares personal experiences amidst war and reflections on patient treatment. The content leans towards personal narrative and emotional expression, with low direct relevance to PT clinical practice.

items.title: Investigating naming error patterns after non-invasive brain stimulation and language treatment in persons with aphasia
items.summary: This preprint study investigated naming error patterns after non-invasive brain stimulation (right cerebellar tDCS) paired with computerized aphasia therapy in persons with aphasia, suggesting a potential shift in error types from semantic to phonological/neologistic.
items.curatedReason: 这项预印本研究探讨了无创脑刺激结合语言治疗对失语症患者命名错误模式的影响。结果提示，右侧小脑 tDCS 辅助计算机失语症治疗可能会改变命名错误类型。如果你关注神经调控技术，这提供了一个早期信号，但作为预印本，结论仍需同行评审。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性脑刺激和语言治疗后失语症患者命名错误模式的研究
items.summaryZh: 这项预印本研究调查了非侵入性脑刺激（右侧小脑 tDCS）结合计算机失语症治疗后，失语症患者命名错误模式的变化，提示错误类型可能从语义错误转向语音/新词错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preprint investigates the impact of non-invasive brain stimulation combined with language treatment on naming error patterns in persons with aphasia. Results suggest that right cerebellar tDCS combined with computerized aphasia therapy may alter naming error types. If you follow neuromodulation techniques, this provides an early signal, but as a preprint, conclusions require peer review.
items.limitation: 这是一篇预印本文章，尚未经过同行评审。研究设计为小样本探索性研究，未报告关键统计量，结果需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a preprint article and has not yet undergone peer review. The study design is a small-sample exploratory study, and key statistics are not reported, so results should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: This narrative summarizes key themes and discussions from the "Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment" conference, which brought together multidisciplinary experts to examine future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 此次多学科会议的总结强调了脊髓损伤治疗的未来方向。作为临床医生，关注这些前沿主题有助于你了解和整合最新的治疗理念与研究进展，提前布局潜在的新技术和协作模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口”会议的关键主题和讨论，此次会议汇集了多学科专家，旨在探讨脊髓损伤（SCI）护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference summary highlights future directions in spinal cord injury treatment. As a clinician, staying abreast of these cutting-edge topics helps you understand and integrate the latest therapeutic concepts and research advancements, proactively positioning for potential new technologies and collaborative models.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Efficacy of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation combined with soft robotic glove training for slight-to-moderate post-stroke upper limb spasticity: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: 一项随机对照试验（N=54）显示，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）联合软性机器人手套训练能改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReason: rTMS联合软性机器人手套训练对卒中后上肢痉挛的改善效果显著。对于有轻中度上肢痉挛的卒中患者，这提供了一个有潜力的新型联合干预方案，值得你考虑引入临床。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激联合软性机器人手套训练治疗轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖54例患者的随机对照试验表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）与软性机器人手套训练相结合，能有效改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: rTMS combined with soft robotic glove training shows significant improvement for post-stroke upper limb spasticity. For stroke patients with mild-to-moderate upper limb spasticity, this offers a promising new combined intervention, which you should consider for clinical integration.
items.limitation: 样本量相对较小（54例），需要更大规模的研究进一步验证其长期效果和适用人群。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is relatively small (54 patients), and larger studies are needed to further validate long-term effects and applicable populations.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Quality of Life for Aging People Living With HIV: Addressing Multimorbidity and Stigma.
items.summary: 一篇视点文章指出，随着HIV感染者寿命延长，老龄化HIV感染者的康复需求日益增加，涉及多重合并症和病耻感。
items.curatedReason: 随着HIV感染者老龄化，其康复需求日益凸显，且涉及多重合并症和病耻感。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注这类人群的特殊需求，特别是老年康复策略与心理社会支持的整合。
items.titleZh: HIV感染者老龄化群体的康复与生活质量：应对多重合并症与病耻感
items.summaryZh: 一篇视点文章强调，随着抗逆转录病毒疗法的普及，HIV已转变为慢性病，导致感染者老龄化。到2030年，预计70%的HIV感染者将超过50岁，这带来了多重合并症和病耻感等新的康复挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: As the HIV population ages, their rehabilitation needs, complicated by multimorbidity and stigma, are becoming more prominent. As a physical therapist, you need to be aware of the specific needs of this population, especially regarding the integration of geriatric rehabilitation strategies and psychosocial support.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Accuracy of visual estimation of shoulder abduction by expert physiotherapists: a comparative study using 3D motion capture.
items.summary: A comparative study found that expert physiotherapists' visual estimation of shoulder abduction, even with video assistance, showed only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture, suggesting potential inaccuracies in clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 专家在视频辅助下对肩关节外展角度的目测准确性只有中度到良好水平 (ICC 0.70-0.84)。这意味着日常临床中仅凭目测可能高估或低估患者 ROM。
items.titleZh: 专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展角度的准确性：一项使用 3D 运动捕捉的比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项比较研究发现，即使有视频辅助，专家物理治疗师对肩关节外展的目测准确性与 3D 运动捕捉的一致性仅为中度至良好 (ICC 0.70-0.84)，提示临床实践中可能存在不准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Expert visual estimation of shoulder abduction range of motion, even with video assistance, shows only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture. This implies that relying solely on visual estimation in daily practice might lead to over- or underestimation of patient ROM.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了肩关节外展一个平面的 ROM 目测准确性，且未探究不同经验水平理疗师的差异。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed visual estimation accuracy for shoulder abduction in one plane and did not explore differences among physiotherapists with varying experience levels.

items.title: Between the Snap and the Return: A Prospective Narrative Analysis of Four Voices from inside Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Recovery.
items.summary: A prospective narrative analysis explored four patients' evolving experiences throughout anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性叙事分析深入探讨了四位患者在ACL重建术后康复过程中的经验，弥补了横断面研究的不足。这能够帮助你更全面地理解ACL患者在不同康复阶段的心理和生理变化，从而提供更具个体化和情感支持的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 从发球到回击之间：前交叉韧带重建术后康复中四位患者的前瞻性叙事分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过前瞻性叙事分析，探索了四位患者在前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后康复过程中不断变化的体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective narrative analysis delves into the experiences of four patients during ACL reconstruction recovery, complementing the limitations of cross-sectional studies. This can help you more comprehensively understand the psychological and physiological changes in ACL patients at different rehabilitation stages, thereby providing more individualized and emotionally supportive rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙事分析，样本量较小（4位患者），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative analysis with a small sample size (4 patients), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.summary: This study analyzed 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients across approach, turning, and departure phases to reveal detailed characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，揭示了转身过程中不同阶段的详细特征。这些数据能让你更精细地评估患者的转身功能障碍，从而设计更具针对性的神经康复训练方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态的分阶段分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，以揭示其在接近、转身和离开阶段的详细特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study conducted a phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients, revealing detailed characteristics of different turning phases. This data will enable you to more precisely evaluate patients' turning functional deficits and design more targeted neurological rehabilitation training programs.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于180°转身，可能无法完全代表日常生活中的其他复杂转身动作。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to 180° turns and may not fully represent other complex turning movements in daily life.

items.title: Investigation of the Effectiveness of Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy and Kinesiotaping in Individuals With Carpal Tunnel Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 54 individuals with mild to moderate carpal tunnel syndrome found extracorporeal shock wave therapy and kinesiotaping, combined with splinting and exercises, to be effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明体外冲击波疗法与肌内效贴在腕管综合征治疗中具有潜力。将冲击波疗法或肌内效贴作为腕部夹板和神经-肌腱滑动锻炼的辅助手段，可以为轻中度腕管综合征患者提供更好的治疗效果，特别是电生理改善。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴在腕管综合征患者中有效性的调查：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对54名轻中度腕管综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴结合腕部夹板和神经-肌腱滑动锻炼是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests extracorporeal shock wave therapy and kinesiotaping show promise in carpal tunnel syndrome treatment. Consider adding shockwave therapy or kinesiotaping as adjuncts to wrist splinting and nerve-tendon gliding exercises for mild to moderate CTS, particularly for electrophysiological improvements.
items.limitation: 本研究的局限性在于样本量相对较小（54人），且随访期未明确，可能影响长期效果的评估。
items.limitationEn: The study's limitations include a relatively small sample size (54 participants) and an unspecified follow-up period, which may affect the assessment of long-term effects.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation: A systematic review of outcomes, complications, and cost-effectiveness
items.summary: A systematic review on bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation examined outcomes, complications, and cost-effectiveness, revealing varying etiologies globally.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述提供了胫骨截肢患者骨锚固假体的全面评估。它强化了骨锚固假体在功能和并发症方面的优势与局限性，帮助你在临床中更好地为患者选择合适的假体方案，尤其要权衡其成本效益。
items.titleZh: 胫骨截肢骨锚固假体：一项关于结果、并发症和成本效益的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项关于胫骨截肢骨锚固假体的系统综述考察了其结果、并发症和成本效益，揭示了全球范围内不同的病因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a comprehensive evaluation of bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation. It reinforces the benefits and limitations of bone-anchored prostheses regarding function and complications, helping you select appropriate prosthetic solutions for patients, especially when considering cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的局限性在于纳入研究的异质性以及潜在的出版偏倚，且可能缺乏长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The limitations of this systematic review include the heterogeneity of included studies, potential publication bias, and possible lack of long-term follow-up data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Investigating the Effectiveness of Multidisciplinary Rehabilitation for Persistent Post-Concussive Symptoms.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study evaluated an individualized multidisciplinary rehabilitation program for persistent post-concussive symptoms, identifying initial symptoms that predict overall symptom burden after rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究支持个性化多学科康复在治疗持续性脑震荡后症状方面的有效性。你需要将多学科方法整合到实践中，并利用初期症状预测患者的康复结果。
items.titleZh: 调查多学科康复对持续性脑震荡后症状的有效性。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究评估了个性化多学科康复项目治疗持续性脑震荡后症状的有效性，并确定了预测康复后总体症状负担的初期症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study supports the efficacy of individualized multidisciplinary rehabilitation for persistent post-concussive symptoms. You should integrate multidisciplinary approaches into your practice and use initial symptoms to predict patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，其局限性在于可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，且数据来源于单一中心。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, its limitations include potential selection bias and confounding factors, with data from a single center.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Low Back Pain: A Review.
items.summary: A review in JAMA highlights low back pain as a leading cause of disability globally, with approximately 90% of cases being nonspecific.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述强调了腰痛的全球负担和非特异性腰痛的普遍性。你需要加强对非特异性腰痛的鉴别诊断能力，并根据最新证据制定个性化治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 腰痛：一篇综述。
items.summaryZh: 《美国医学会杂志》上的一篇综述指出，腰痛是全球致残的主要原因，其中约90%为非特异性腰痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the global burden and prevalence of nonspecific low back pain. You should enhance your diagnostic skills for nonspecific low back pain and tailor individualized treatment plans based on the latest evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述为叙述性综述，可能存在作者偏倚和未能涵盖所有相关文献的局限。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, subject to author bias and potentially not covering all relevant literature.

items.title: Manual therapy promotes prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain: An fNIRS-Based randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that combined manual therapy and exercise may improve prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain, suggesting a neurobiological mechanism for pain relief.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，手法治疗结合运动可能通过改善前额叶神经网络效率来缓解慢性非特异性颈痛。这为联合干预的神经生理学机制提供了初步的客观证据。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗促进慢性非特异性颈痛患者前额叶神经效率：一项基于 fNIRS 的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，手法治疗结合运动可能通过改善前额叶神经网络效率来缓解慢性非特异性颈痛，提示了其神经生物学机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that manual therapy combined with exercise may alleviate chronic non-specific neck pain by improving prefrontal neural network efficiency. This provides initial objective evidence for the neurophysiological mechanisms of combined interventions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量与fNIRS测量方法的外推性是其主要局限。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of the fNIRS measurement method and sample size are the primary limitations.

items.title: Toward Precision Cardiac Rehabilitation: Current Limitations and Future Opportunities of Omics and Artificial Intelligence.
items.summary: A review discusses current limitations and future opportunities for applying omics and artificial intelligence in cardiac rehabilitation, moving toward precision medicine tailored to individual patient characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述展望了组学和人工智能在心脏康复中的应用前景，提出了“精准心脏康复”的概念。你应该关注这些前沿技术如何改变未来心脏康复的评估与干预，但目前仍处于早期阶段。
items.titleZh: 迈向精准心脏康复：组学和人工智能的当前局限与未来机遇
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了组学和人工智能在心脏康复中的当前局限和未来机遇，旨在实现根据个体患者特征定制的精准康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review anticipates the prospects of omics and artificial intelligence in cardiac rehabilitation, introducing the concept of "precision cardiac rehabilitation." You should pay attention to how these cutting-edge technologies might transform future cardiac rehabilitation assessment and intervention, though they are still in early stages.
items.limitation: 这是一篇前瞻性综述，缺乏实证研究数据来支持其提出的精准康复模型。
items.limitationEn: This is a prospective review, lacking empirical research data to support its proposed precision rehabilitation model.

items.title: Linking the Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) to the ICF: Enhancing Standardized Functional Assessment in Parkinson's Disease.
items.summary: A study explored linking the Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) to the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health (ICF) to enhance standardized functional assessment in Parkinson's Disease.
items.curatedReason: 本研究探索了将帕金森病评估信息表（PIF）与 ICF 框架关联的方法，旨在标准化功能评估。这有助于实现跨服务、跨国界的帕金森患者功能数据可比性，是你实践中提升评估规范化的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 将评估前信息表 (PIF) 与 ICF 关联：增强帕金森病标准化功能评估
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了将帕金森病评估前信息表（PIF）与国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）关联，以增强帕金森病的标准化功能评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores linking the Parkinson's disease Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) with the ICF framework to standardize functional assessment. This is a crucial reference for you to improve assessment standardization, enabling comparable functional data across services and countries for Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究侧重于概念性关联，未直接评估实际临床应用中的数据一致性和有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on conceptual linkage and does not directly evaluate data consistency and validity in actual clinical application.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Wellbeing After Stroke-2 (WAterS-2): a feasibility study with process evaluation exploring inclusive, accessible, online psychological support after stroke
items.summary: A feasibility study with process evaluation explored inclusive, accessible, online psychological support based on Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) for psychological adjustment post-stroke, targeting underserved groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，通过线上心理支持和接纳与承诺疗法（ACT）来支持卒中患者心理调适是可行的。这对扩展卒中康复服务范围、触达未被充分服务的人群具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 卒中后福祉-2 (WAterS-2)：一项探索卒中后包容、可及、在线心理支持的可行性研究与过程评估
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性研究及其过程评估，探讨了基于接纳与承诺疗法（ACT）的包容、可及的在线心理支持在卒中后心理调适中的可行性，旨在服务未被充分照护的人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that online psychological support and Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) are feasible for supporting stroke patients' psychological adjustment. This is significant for expanding stroke rehabilitation services and reaching underserved populations.
items.limitation: 这是一项单臂可行性研究，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm feasibility study lacking a control group, thus unable to assess the actual efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: Effect of Visceral Manipulation Versus Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique in Shoulder Impingement Syndrome.
items.summary: A study compared visceral manipulation with integrated neuromuscular inhibition technique for shoulder impingement syndrome, finding differing effects on pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术治疗肩峰撞击综合征的短期效果。但其证据强度有限，不宜作为临床实践改变的依据。
items.titleZh: 内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术对肩峰撞击综合征的疗效比较
items.summaryZh: 一项研究比较了内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术在肩峰撞击综合征治疗中的效果，发现两者在疼痛和功能方面存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compared the short-term effects of visceral manipulation versus integrated neuromuscular inhibition technique for shoulder impingement syndrome. However, its evidence strength is limited and should not be used as a basis for changing clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了短期效果，长期疗效和作用机制尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed short-term effects; long-term efficacy and mechanisms of action remain unclear.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Infographic. Ramadan: fasting with diabetes
items.summary: An infographic highlights the unique challenges faced by patients with diabetes who observe diurnal fasting during Ramadan, focusing on health risks and management in regions with high Muslim populations.
items.curatedReason: 这张信息图简要介绍了斋月期间糖尿病患者禁食的挑战。虽然不是直接的康复干预，但能帮你更好地理解和管理文化及宗教因素对患者健康行为的影响，尤其是在多文化背景的执业环境中。
items.titleZh: 信息图：斋月与糖尿病患者禁食
items.summaryZh: 一张信息图强调了斋月期间糖尿病患者进行昼间禁食所面临的独特挑战，重点关注在穆斯林人口众多的地区存在的健康风险和管理问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic briefly outlines the challenges of fasting for diabetic patients during Ramadan. While not a direct rehabilitation intervention, it can help you better understand and manage the impact of cultural and religious factors on patient health behaviors, especially in multicultural practice settings.

items.title: Quantitative Ultrasonographic Assessment of Muscle Structure and Correlations with Motor Function Scales in Nusinersen-Treated Children with Spinal Muscular Atrophy
items.summary: This study investigated ultrasonographic muscle thickness and echointensity in children with spinal muscular atrophy receiving nusinersen, comparing them with healthy controls and correlating with motor function scale scores.
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）患儿，Nusinersen 治疗后超声评估肌肉结构与运动功能量表分数的相关性提供了客观生物标志物。这意味着你可以将超声作为辅助工具，更细致地评估和监测 SMA 患儿的肌肉变化，并与临床功能进展结合。
items.titleZh: Nusinersen 治疗脊髓性肌萎缩症患儿肌肉结构定量超声评估及其与运动功能量表的相关性
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了接受 Nusinersen 治疗的脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）患儿的超声肌肉厚度和回声强度，并将其与健康对照组进行比较，同时评估了这些参数与运动功能量表分数的相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For children with spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), the correlation between ultrasonographic muscle structure and motor function scales after Nusinersen treatment provides objective biomarkers. This means you can use ultrasound as an adjunct to more precisely assess and monitor muscle changes in SMA children, integrating it with clinical functional progress.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Mandatory genetic testing in sport: World Athletics and World Boxing repeat the discredited mistakes of the past
items.summary: World Athletics and World Boxing announced mandatory SRY gene testing for female category participation, echoing past discredited policies and raising significant ethical and human rights concerns in sport.
items.curatedReason: 国际田联和国际拳击联合会推行的强制性SRY基因检测，已经引发了全球体育界的伦理和人权争议。这些政策可能对女性运动员的参赛资格和身心健康造成深远影响，你需要关注其在体育康复领域可能带来的执业风险和伦理挑战。
items.titleZh: 强制性基因检测在体育领域：世界田联和世界拳击重蹈过去 discredited 的覆辙
items.summaryZh: 世界田联和世界拳击宣布对女性组别参赛者进行强制性SRY基因检测，这重蹈了过去被否定政策的覆辙，并在体育界引发了重大的伦理和人权担忧。
items.curatedReasonEn: The mandatory SRY gene testing implemented by World Athletics and World Boxing has sparked global ethical and human rights controversies in sports. These policies could profoundly impact female athletes' eligibility and well-being. You need to be aware of the potential practice risks and ethical challenges in sports rehabilitation.

items.title: SRY gene screening in elite Athletics: rationale, science and implementation of the World Athletics Regulations
items.summary: World Athletics reaffirmed its policy requiring SRY gene screening for female athletes in elite competitions to ensure eligibility for the female biological sex category, outlining the rationale, science, and implementation.
items.curatedReason: 世界田联解释了其精英级别田径运动中SRY基因筛查的理由和实施细则。这是对运动员参赛资格认定的重大调整，你需要了解其背后的生物学和政策逻辑，以便在支持运动员时能提供准确信息并规避执业风险。
items.titleZh: 精英田径运动中的 SRY 基因筛查：世界田联法规的依据、科学与实施
items.summaryZh: 世界田联重申了其精英级别比赛中对女性运动员进行SRY基因筛查的政策，以确保符合女性生物性别类别的资格，并阐述了其依据、科学和实施细节。
items.curatedReasonEn: World Athletics explains the rationale and implementation of SRY gene screening in elite athletics. This is a significant shift in athlete eligibility criteria. You need to understand the underlying biological and policy logic to provide accurate information to athletes and mitigate practice risks.

items.title: Make or break: psychotropic medications have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance
items.summary: A commentary discusses how psychotropic medications, used by athletes for mental health conditions like anxiety, depression, and ADHD, can have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance, impacting physical resilience and peak performances.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评讨论了精神药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应。作为运动康复医生，你需要认识到运动员可能因精神健康问题服用药物，并评估这些药物如何影响其运动表现和康复进展，从而调整训练方案和沟通策略。
items.titleZh: 成败与否：精神药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论讨论了精神药物（运动员用于治疗焦虑、抑郁和ADHD等精神健康问题）如何对神经肌肉表现产生非标签效应，从而影响身体恢复力和巅峰表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary discusses the off-label effects of psychotropic medications on neuromuscular performance. As a sports physical therapist, you need to recognize that athletes may be taking medication for mental health issues and assess how these drugs affect their athletic performance and rehabilitation progress, thereby adjusting training plans and communication strategies.

items.title: Delayed body literacy in elite female athletes: a lived experience at age 30
items.summary: An article by a four-time Olympian and 10-time Olympic medallist discusses the delayed body literacy she experienced as an elite female athlete, only truly understanding her body's workings near age 30, despite it being her career vehicle.
items.curatedReason: 这篇来自奥运奖牌得主的文章强调了精英女运动员对自身身体认识的滞后性。它提醒你，在与女运动员（尤其是年轻运动员）合作时，应主动促进她们的身体素养，帮助她们理解生理周期、营养和训练之间的关系，以优化表现并预防损伤。
items.titleZh: 精英女运动员延迟的身体素养：30岁时的亲身经历
items.summaryZh: 一篇由四届奥运会选手和十届奥运奖牌得主撰写的文章，讲述了她作为一名精英女运动员所经历的身体素养滞后问题，尽管身体是她职业生涯的载体，但直到近30岁才真正了解自己的身体运作方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article from an Olympic medalist highlights the delayed body literacy among elite female athletes. It reminds you that when working with female athletes (especially younger ones), you should proactively promote their body literacy, helping them understand the relationship between their physiological cycle, nutrition, and training to optimize performance and prevent injuries.

items.title: Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians edition: uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine
items.summary: The Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) edition explores the central theme of uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine, aligning with their upcoming 2026 Annual Scientific Conference in Brisbane.
items.curatedReason: 这是澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）年会的特刊，主题是运动医学中的不确定性。这提醒你，运动医学领域仍存在许多未解之谜，批判性思维和应对复杂病例的能力至关重要。
items.titleZh: 澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院特刊：运动与运动医学中的不确定性
items.summaryZh: 澳大拉西亚运动与运动医师学院（ACSEP）特刊探讨了运动与运动医学中的不确定性这一核心主题，与其即将在布里斯班举行的2026年年会相呼应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a special edition for the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) annual scientific conference, focusing on uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine. It reminds you that many unknowns persist in sports medicine, and critical thinking and the ability to manage complex cases are crucial.

items.title: Warm-up is not a workout: a principles-based critique of continued efforts to use warm-up programmes for ACL injury prevention
items.summary: A critique argues against the continued efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention, emphasizing the distinction between warm-up and workout in terms of efficacy versus effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章明确指出热身并非训练，并对将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的持续努力提出了批判。你应区分热身与训练的目的，并认识到虽然热身有益，但不能替代全面的损伤预防训练计划。
items.titleZh: 热身并非训练：对持续将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的原则性批判
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章批判了将热身计划持续用于 ACL（前交叉韧带）损伤预防的做法，强调了热身与训练在功效和效果之间存在区别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explicitly states that warm-up is not a workout and critiques ongoing efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention. You should distinguish the purpose of warm-up from training and recognize that while warm-ups are beneficial, they are not a substitute for comprehensive injury prevention training programs.

items.title: Thriving in Motion: a community-based therapeutic physical literacy programme for children experiencing barriers to being active
items.summary: “Thriving in Motion” is a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program designed to engage children experiencing medical, behavioral, and/or social barriers to regular physical activity.
items.curatedReason: “Thriving in Motion”项目为那些面临活动障碍的儿童提供了一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养计划。你可以借鉴其模式，为有医疗、行为或社会挑战的儿童提供量身定制的运动服务，提高他们的身体活动水平和整体健康。
items.titleZh: “Thriving in Motion”：一项为面临活动障碍儿童设计的社区治疗性体育素养计划
items.summaryZh: “Thriving in Motion”是一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养项目，旨在帮助那些因医疗、行为或社会原因而难以参与常规体育活动的儿童。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Thriving in Motion" program offers a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program for children facing barriers to being active. You can learn from its model to provide tailored exercise services for children with medical, behavioral, and/or social challenges, improving their physical activity levels and overall well-being.

items.title: Advancing the management of patellar tendinopathy (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD study focused on improving patellar tendinopathy management through patient education and understanding of treatment response, evaluating AI chatbot reliability and long-term prognosis of exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和理解治疗反应来提升髌骨肌腱病的管理。你应该关注 AI 聊天机器人在提供健康信息方面的可靠性，以及运动疗法对髌骨肌腱病的长期预后数据，以优化你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 髌骨肌腱病管理的进展（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和对治疗反应的理解来提升髌骨肌腱病管理，同时评估了 AI 聊天机器人的可靠性以及运动疗法在长期预后中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research aims to advance patellar tendinopathy management by improving patient education and understanding of treatment response. You should pay attention to the reliability of AI chatbots for health information and long-term prognosis data for exercise therapy in patellar tendinopathy to optimize your clinical practice.

items.title: Cardiac care of athletes with disabilities: are we prepared to adapt?
items.summary: This commentary highlights the increasing participation of athletes with disabilities in sports and the existing gap in research regarding their cardiac care, urging adaptation in policies and practices.
items.curatedReason: 随着残疾运动员参与运动的频率和强度增加，你需要了解他们独特的 cardíaco 护理需求。目前对残疾运动员心脏特征的研究不足，这将限制你提供循证的、适应性的运动指导和心血管筛查。
items.titleZh: 残疾运动员的心脏护理：我们准备好适应了吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论强调了残疾运动员在体育运动中参与度的增加，以及在他们心脏护理方面现有研究的不足，敦促政策和实践进行调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: As athletes with disabilities participate in sports more frequently and intensely, you need to understand their unique cardiac care needs. The current lack of research on cardiac characteristics in athletes with disabilities will limit your ability to provide evidence-based, adaptive sports guidance and cardiovascular screening.

items.title: Characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study investigated characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity in the MOBILIZE trial.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点及原因。你需要了解这些障碍，以便设计更具包容性和吸引力的干预措施，提高这类复杂患者的依从性。
items.titleZh: 多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点及原因：MOBILIZE 试验的一项探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性横断面研究调查了 MOBILIZE 试验中多重共病患者不参加运动治疗和自我管理支持的特点和原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study sheds light on the characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. You need to understand these barriers to design more inclusive and engaging interventions that improve adherence in this complex patient population.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A large prospective cohort study involving three cohorts (Health Professionals Follow-up Study, Nurses’ Health Study, Nurses’ Health Study II) found that resistance training is associated with lower all-cause and cause-specific mortality, demonstrating a dose-response relationship and joint benefits with aerobic activity.
items.curatedReason: 长期抗阻训练与全因和特定原因死亡率的关系，这项大型前瞻性队列研究给出了明确证据：抗阻训练不仅降低全因死亡率，还能降低特定疾病死亡率，并且与有氧运动结合效果更佳。这是你向患者推广运动处方时最有力的证据之一，务必在日常工作中强调抗阻训练的重要性。
items.titleZh: 长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率：剂量反应和与有氧体力活动的联合关联评估
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖三个大型前瞻性队列（健康专业人员随访研究、护士健康研究、护士健康研究II）的研究发现，抗阻训练与较低的全因及特定原因死亡率相关，并显示出剂量反应关系以及与有氧活动的联合益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large prospective cohort study provides clear evidence on the relationship between long-term resistance training and all-cause and cause-specific mortality: resistance training not only lowers all-cause mortality but also reduces mortality from specific diseases, with even better results when combined with aerobic exercise. This is one of the strongest pieces of evidence you have when advocating for exercise prescriptions to patients; be sure to emphasize the importance of resistance training in your daily practice.

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A commentary emphasizes the sit-to-stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for future health outcomes, correlating muscular strength with long-term health conditions and advocating for its increased use in assessment.
items.curatedReason: “坐站测试”（Sit-to-stand test）作为未来健康结局的有力预后因素，这篇述评强调了其价值。你应该认识到这个看似简单的测试背后有强大的循证支持，它能有效地预测多种长期健康状况。在日常评估中，可以更重视它的应用，并据此调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 坐站测试成为未来健康结局的有力预后因素：不同版本、测量属性及未来展望
items.summaryZh: 一篇述评强调了坐站测试作为未来健康结局有力预后因素的价值，它将肌肉力量与长期健康状况相关联，并倡导在评估中更广泛地使用该测试。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the value of the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for future health outcomes. You should recognize that this seemingly simple test has strong evidence backing its ability to predict multiple long-term health conditions. Integrate it more effectively into your routine assessments and adjust intervention strategies accordingly.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A multicenter, three-arm, randomized controlled trial evaluated the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualized treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture, comparing it against default operative and non-operative strategies.
items.curatedReason: 跟腱急性断裂的个体化治疗，CARTA 算法（哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法）的 RCT 结果出来了。它旨在提供比默认手术或非手术治疗更优的个性化方案。如果你在跟腱断裂的治疗决策中，应该关注这一进展，这可能会改变你评估和推荐治疗路径的方式。
items.titleZh: 哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）个体化治疗急性跟腱断裂的随机三臂试验研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心、三臂、随机对照试验评估了哥本哈根跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）在急性跟腱断裂个体化治疗中的应用，并与默认手术及非手术治疗策略进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: The RCT results for the Copenhagen Achilles Tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) are out, aiming to provide individualized treatment superior to default operative or non-operative strategies for acute Achilles tendon rupture. If you are involved in treatment decisions for Achilles tendon ruptures, you should pay attention to this development, as it might change how you assess and recommend treatment pathways.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A single-site, open-label, assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized clinical trial evaluated the effectiveness of "Concussion Essentials" (CE), a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in 8–18-year-olds.
items.curatedReason: 青少年持续性脑震荡后症状的多模式治疗，一项 RCT 评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）方案的有效性。这项研究为青少年 PPCS 提供了一个有前景的结构化、多学科干预模型。如果你手头有这类患者，这为你提供了更多证据支持的治疗选择。
items.titleZh: 针对青少年持续性脑震荡后症状的多模式对症治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单中心、开放标签、评估者盲法、平行组随机临床试验评估了“脑震荡要点”（Concussion Essentials, CE）的有效性，该方案是针对8-18岁青少年持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多学科对症治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: An RCT evaluated the effectiveness of the "Concussion Essentials" (CE) program for multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS). This study offers a promising structured, multidisciplinary intervention model for adolescent PPCS. If you have such patients, this provides you with more evidence-supported treatment options.

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A large population-based study (N=135,881) using national hospital data found that patients who underwent ACL reconstruction had a 4.9 times higher long-term risk of knee arthroplasty compared to their contralateral knee.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于英国国家医院数据库（N=135,881）的大规模研究显示，ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险显著增加。与对侧膝关节相比，ACLr 后的膝关节置换风险高出4.9倍。这意味着你必须对 ACLr 患者进行持续性教育，并早期干预，以延缓骨关节炎进展，降低远期置换需求。
items.titleZh: 以对侧膝关节作为内部对照评估 ACL 重建术后膝关节置换的长期风险：一项对135,881名患者进行的国家医院发病率统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于国家医院发病率统计数据库对135,881名患者进行的大规模人群研究发现，接受 ACL 重建术的患者，与对侧膝关节相比，长期膝关节置换的风险高出4.9倍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large-scale study (N=135,881) based on the UK National Hospital Episode Statistics database shows a significantly increased long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction. The risk of knee replacement after ACLr is 4.9 times higher compared to the contralateral knee. This means you must provide continuous education and early intervention for ACLr patients to slow the progression of osteoarthritis and reduce the long-term need for replacement.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy for chronic conditions on physical activity, function, fitness, and quality of life, using a narrative synthesis.
items.curatedReason: 这项伞形综述评估了慢性病患者运动治疗后的维持性干预措施对身体活动的有效性。它强调了维持干预的重要性，但同时也发现证据质量不一。这意味着你在制定长期康复计划时，应积极融入维持策略，但需根据具体慢性病的指南，选择证据级别最高的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 运动治疗后促进身体活动的维持性干预措施对慢性病患者的有效性：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 一项伞形综述采用叙述性综合分析，调查了慢性病患者在运动治疗后，维持性干预措施对身体活动、功能、体能和生活质量的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review assessed the effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity after exercise therapy for chronic conditions. It underscores the importance of maintenance interventions but also noted varied evidence quality. This means you should actively integrate maintenance strategies into long-term rehabilitation plans, but choose interventions with the highest level of evidence based on specific chronic disease guidelines.

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: This study found that functionally stratifying older adults using the Short Physical Performance Battery revealed speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age, indicating early functional decline.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究强调了功能性分层在识别老年人步态障碍方面的重要性，而非仅仅依赖年龄。这意味着你在评估老年患者时，应采用更精细的功能性工具（如 SPPB）来早期发现步态问题，即使他们看起来“年轻”，这可能揭示出速度之外的早期损伤。
items.titleZh: 功能性分层揭示了超越年龄的独立于速度的步态障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，使用简短身体表现电池（SPPB）对老年人进行功能性分层，揭示了超越年龄的独立于速度的步态障碍，表明了早期的功能衰退。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study underscores the importance of functional stratification in identifying gait impairments in older adults, rather than relying solely on chronological age. This means you should use more refined functional tools (like SPPB) in assessing older patients to detect early gait problems, even if they appear 'young,' which could reveal early impairments beyond speed.

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perceived participation of people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties, highlighting that while the ICF framework is useful, it lacks the subjective perception of participation.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症患者的参与感是康复的关键，但这篇定性研究强调，ICF 框架仍需补充患者的主观视角。这意味着在评估和干预时，你不仅要关注 ICF 的客观指标，更要主动探寻患者对其自身参与的理解和期望，以实现真正以患者为中心的康复目标。
items.titleZh: 有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待参与？一项定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了有步行困难的多发性硬化症患者对参与的看法，强调国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）框架虽有用，但缺乏对参与的主观感知。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patient participation is key in MS rehabilitation, but this qualitative study highlights that the ICF framework needs to be supplemented with the patient's subjective perspective. This means you should not only focus on objective ICF metrics during assessment and intervention but also actively explore patients' understanding and expectations of their own participation to achieve truly patient-centered rehabilitation goals.

items.title: Sport-related trauma and motor neurone disease: a scoping review of epidemiology, mechanisms and future directions
items.summary: A scoping review mapped existing epidemiological evidence regarding the relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease/Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (MND/ALS), identifying potential mechanistic pathways and future research directions.
items.curatedReason: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病（MND/ALS）之间的关系尚不明确。这项范围综述旨在绘制现有流行病学证据，并确定潜在的机制途径。它虽然没有给出明确的临床指导，但为你理解这一复杂问题提供了研究方向，提醒你在高强度体育活动背景下关注神经系统症状。
items.titleZh: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病：流行病学、机制和未来方向的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病/肌萎缩侧索硬化症（MND/ALS）之间关系的现有流行病学证据，识别了潜在的机制途径，并提出了未来的研究方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: The relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease (MND/ALS) is unclear. This scoping review aims to map existing epidemiological evidence and identify potential mechanistic pathways. While it doesn't provide clear clinical guidance, it offers research directions for understanding this complex issue, reminding you to pay attention to neurological symptoms in the context of high-intensity athletic activities.

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in a diverse group of rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis, identifying shared profiles across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在剖面分析探索了康复患者生活质量结局的模式。了解不同诊断组患者共享的生活质量体验剖面，能帮助你更精细地定制康复计划，关注到患者的整体福祉。
items.titleZh: 应用潜在剖面分析探索康复患者生活质量结局的模式
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究通过潜在剖面分析，探索了各类康复患者生活质量结局的模式，识别了跨诊断组的共享剖面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explored patterns of quality-of-life outcomes in rehabilitation patients using latent profile analysis. Understanding shared quality-of-life experience profiles across different diagnostic groups can help you tailor rehabilitation plans more precisely, focusing on patients' overall well-being.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis
